Made of FDA-approved, AB-grade ceramic. Safe for the dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer! Sturdy and durable, these mug sets can easily handle daily use in your kitchen.
Perfect for coffee, tea, cocoa and cereal. you can just give it away as presents, make personalized gifts by filling them with candy, pens etc, for DIY projects, for decorating purposes.
We are committed to providing high-quality and well-packaged porcelain products. Smilatte promise to offer replacements for products damaged by non-human factors within 30 days of purchase.
description: Product Description SMILATTE 20 OZ LARGE COFFEE MUG Smilatte' s idea is transmitting the living idea of health, interest, and the high quality to the customers. We will remain committed to this idea and continue to produce kitchenware with high quality and creativity. You have five color choices, you can choose red, white, black, blue or yellow according to your preferences. Multi-Purpose Perfect for coffee, tea, cocoa and cereal. you can just give it away as presents, make personalized gifts by filling them with candy, pens etc, for DIY projects, for decorating purposes. A Good Day Start An exquisite container may start your good mood. You can brew coffee, oatmeal, dried fruit, etc., and it is big enough and has a handle to prevent you from being burned. Easy to Clean Durable and easy to clean, AB-grade ceramic. Safe for the dishwasher, microwave, oven and freezer! Sturdy and durable, these mug sets can easily handle daily use in your kitchen.
